analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights listening to Afghan civil society on the importance of EU support for women, civil society, victims, and human rights within an inclusive peace process. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not referenced; no historical success or overcoming obstacles mentioned. EU2 (united) – No mention of EU unity or solidarity among member states. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – Not applicable; focuses on actions outside the EU. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – No pioneering regulation or leadership on broad challenges asserted. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Yes; it underscores the EU’s support for human rights, women, victims, and civil society abroad, portraying the EU as defending fair causes. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – Yes; supporting an inclusive peace process in Afghanistan frames the EU as contributing to peace and global well-being. Conclusion: Narratives EU5 and EU6 are promoted.
